response: On March 15, 2024 at 14:23 UTC, a magnitude 7.2 earthquake struck at a depth of 15 km near Tokyo at coordinates 35.6N 139.7E, prompting an official tsunami warning. This seismic event has impacted an estimated 2.3 million people, with current reports confirming 12 casualties and projected total damage valued at $4.5 billion.
